revision.text:
{{navbar|Flag templates|text=This template:}}
{| class="wikitable" |+ Flag templates ! scope="row" | Output style → ! scope="col" | Country name ! scope="col" | Country name (code) ! scope="col" | Athlete (country code) ! scope="col" | Athlete Country Name ! scope="col" | Country code |- ! scope="row" | Olympic Games | {{tlg|Flag IOC}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC team}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC medalist}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC short}} |- ! scope="row" | Other games | {{tlg|Flag IOC 2}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC 2 team}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC 2 athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC 2 medalist}} || {{tlg|Flag IOC 2 short}} |- ! scope="row" | Paralympic Games | {{tlg|Flag IPC}} || {{tlg|Flag IPC team}} || {{tlg|Flag IPC athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag IPC medalist}} || {{tlg|Flag IPC short}} |- ! scope="row" | Pan American | {{tlg|Flag PASO}} || {{tlg|Flag PASO team}} || {{tlg|Flag PASO athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag PASO medalist}} || |- ! scope="row" | Parapan American | {{tlg|Flag PPASO}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | Commonwealth | {{tlg|Flag CGF}} || {{tlg|Flag CGF team}} || {{tlg|Flag CGF athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag CGF medalist}} || |- ! scope="row" | Southeast Asian | {{tlg|Flag SEAGF}} || {{tlg|Flag SEAGF team}} || {{tlg|Flag SEAGF athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag SEAGF medalist}} || |- ! scope="row" | World Games | {{tlg|Flag IWGA}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | Central American and Caribbean Games | {{tlg|Flag CAC}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | Asian Games | {{tlg|Flag OCA}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | European Games | {{tlg|Flag EOC}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | African Games | {{tlg|Flag AFOC}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | Mediterranean Games | {{tlg|Flag CIJM}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | Summer Universiade | {{tlg|Flag FISU}} || || || || |- ! scope="row" | "Nation at Championships"-style | || {{tlg|Flag link team}} || || || |- ! scope="row" | Generic | {{t|Flag}} || {{tlg|Flag team}} || {{tlg|Flag athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag medalist}} || |- ! scope="row" | Generic (variant) | {{tlg|Flag link}} || || {{tlg|Flag link athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag link medalist}} || |}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Flag templates|text=This template:}}

scope="row" | Generic (variant) | {{tlg|Flag link}} || || {{tlg|Flag link athlete}} || {{tlg|Flag link medalist}} || |}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{navbar|Flag templates|text=This template:}}
{| class="wikitable" |+ Flag templates ! scope="row" | Output style → ! scope="col" | Country name ! scope="col" | Country name (code) ! scope="col" | Athlete (country code) ! scope="col" | Athlete Country Name ! revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Flag templates|text=This template:}}
